label: Junior / Early-career
description: Person taking their first professional steps in technology or looking for a community to learn, get guidance and grow.

label: Student
description: Person who is studying and looking for communities to learn, explore career paths or start connecting with the tech ecosystem.

label: Career Changer / Transitioning into Tech
description: Person coming from another sector or career path and making the leap into technology.

label: Mentee
description: Person looking for accompaniment, guidance or support from more experienced people in their professional development.

label: Mentor
description: Person who accompanies, guides or shares experience to help others grow professionally.

label: Senior / Staff
description: Experienced professional looking for communities to continue deepening knowledge, sharing expertise or leading technical conversations.

label: Frontend Developer
description: Person who develops web interfaces and interactive experiences.

label: Backend Developer
description: Professional who works on server-side logic, APIs and data management.

label: Full-stack Developer
description: Person who develops both the frontend and backend of an application.

label: Mobile Developer
description: Professional who creates native or cross-platform mobile applications.

label: Game Developer
description: Person who designs and develops video games.

label: Embedded & IoT Engineer
description: Professional who works with embedded systems, electronics and the Internet of Things.

label: Robotics Engineer
description: Person who designs and programs robots and autonomous systems.

label: Data Engineer
description: Professional who builds and maintains data pipelines and platforms.

label: Data Scientist
description: Person who analyzes data and creates models to obtain actionable knowledge.

label: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Professional who develops, trains and deploys machine learning models.

label: Data Analyst
description: Person who analyzes data to generate insights and support business decisions.

label: DevOps & Platform Engineer
description: Professional who automates deployments and builds internal platforms for development teams.

label: Cloud Engineer
description: Person specialized in designing and operating cloud solutions.

label: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Professional focused on the reliability, performance and observability of systems.

label: Systems & Network Administrator
description: Person responsible for administering servers, systems and networks.

label: Cybersecurity Engineer
description: Professional specialized in protecting systems, networks and applications against threats.

label: Penetration Tester
description: Person who performs penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities.

label: QA Engineer
description: Professional who plans and executes tests to ensure software quality.

label: Test Automation Engineer
description: Person who automates functional, regression and performance tests.

label: Software Architect
description: Professional responsible for defining the technical architecture of systems and applications.

label: Technical Lead
description: Person who leads technical decisions and guides the development team.

label: Product Manager
description: Professional who defines the vision, strategy and evolution of digital products.

label: Project Manager
description: Person who coordinates teams, resources and timelines in technology projects.

label: Agile Practitioner
description: Professional who facilitates and promotes the use of agile methodologies in teams.

label: UX Designer
description: Person who designs experiences centered on the real needs of users.

label: UI Designer
description: Professional who defines the visual, graphic and interactive part of digital interfaces.

label: Digital Marketer
description: Professional specialized in digital marketing, positioning and online acquisition.

label: Community & Social Media Manager
description: Person who manages digital communities and social media presence.

label: Entrepreneur / Startup Founder
description: Person who creates, drives or leads technology projects and companies.

label: Business & Innovation Manager
description: Professional who drives innovation initiatives, partnerships and business development.

label: Researcher
description: Professional who researches in technological, scientific or academic fields.

label: Educator / Tech Teacher
description: Person who teaches technology in formal or informal contexts and looks for communities to share resources, practices and experiences.

label: PhD / Doctoral Researcher
description: Person in the doctoral or advanced research stage looking to connect with related communities, share work and expand their professional network.

label: Maker
description: Person who creates hardware, electronics or digital fabrication projects.

label: Open Source Contributor
description: Person who contributes to free or open source software projects.

label: Data Journalist
description: Professional who combines data analysis and journalistic narrative to investigate, visualize and communicate information of public interest.

label: Minors / Youth
description: Children and teenagers under 18 who participate in technology communities focused on education, programming or computational thinking.
